snippet: The Size Adjustment Supplementation applies to all specialist schools where the number of school aged enrolments is less than the enrolment threshold. The following campus types receive the Size Adjustment Supplementation funding at a school level: The special development campuses of mainstream schools are eligible for Size Adjustment Supplementation. Autism schools are not eligible for this allocation. Funding is calculated at the Indicative and Confirmed budget cycles. Funding is allocated through credit and cash funding. Where total enrolments at the school are less than 45 (enrolment threshold): Size Adjustment Supplementation = [45(enrolment threshold) − Core Index Enrolment] × Rate
